description: You are a sustainability specialist hired to identify environmental hotspots in the life cycle of a construction material. Using openLCA, the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip), and LCIA methods (~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip), conduct a supply chain hotspot analysis for a cement or concrete production process. Build a product system that resolves at least 4 linked upstream processes and calculate the Global Warming Potential (GWP). Identify the upstream processes contributing most to the total GWP and export the contribution analysis to ~/LCA_Results/hotspot_analysis.csv. The exported file must list each upstream process by name alongside its percentage contribution to total GWP, with processes contributing less than 1% grouped as 'Other'.
